title: Legal Notes by Arvind Datar: Shimla and the Sale of Goods Act
description: Most of us have forgotten that Chapter VII of Indian Contract Act, 1872, (Sections 75 to 123) dealt with provisions relating to Sale of Goods. The subsequent chapters dealt with Indemnity and Guarantee (Chapter VIII, Sections 124 – 147), Chapter IX was on Bailment with Sections 148 – 181 and Chapter X was on Agency with Sections 182 – 238. Interestingly, Chapter XI dealt with partnership (in sections 239 -266) which was replaced by the Partnership Act, 1932.The story of how the Sa
